item.name: Paneer Tikka
item.description: Tender cottage cheese cubes marinated in spiced yogurt, grilled to perfection in a tandoor. Served with mint chutney.

item.name: Chicken Seekh Kebab
item.description: Minced chicken blended with aromatic herbs and spices, skewered and grilled over charcoal. Juicy and flavour-packed.

item.name: Veg Spring Rolls
item.description: Crispy golden rolls stuffed with fresh vegetables and glass noodles, served with sweet chilli dipping sauce.

item.name: Hara Bhara Kebab
item.description: Soft patties made from spinach, peas, and paneer, shallow-fried until golden. A healthy and delicious starter.

item.name: Butter Chicken
item.description: Succulent chicken pieces simmered in a rich, creamy tomato-butter gravy with aromatic spices. Best paired with naan.

item.name: Paneer Butter Masala
item.description: Soft paneer cubes in a velvety tomato-cashew gravy, infused with aromatic spices and finished with fresh cream.

item.name: Dal Makhani
item.description: Black lentils slow-cooked overnight with butter and cream, the classic Punjabi comfort dish. Rich and indulgent.

item.name: Mutton Rogan Josh
item.description: Kashmiri-style slow-braised mutton in a fiery sauce of Kashmiri chillies and whole spices. Deeply aromatic.

item.name: Chole Bhature
item.description: Spiced chickpea curry served with fluffy deep-fried bhature. A beloved North Indian classic for any time of day.

item.name: Fish Curry
item.description: Fresh fish fillets cooked in a tangy Goan-style coconut curry with kokum. A coastal delicacy full of bold flavours.

item.name: Chicken Biryani
item.description: Fragrant basmati rice layered with spiced chicken, caramelised onions, and saffron. Cooked dum-style for maximum flavour.

item.name: Veg Biryani
item.description: Aromatic basmati rice cooked with seasonal vegetables and whole spices. Light yet deeply satisfying.

item.name: Hyderabadi Mutton Biryani
item.description: The royal Hyderabadi dum biryani with tender mutton, aromatic spices, and saffron-infused rice. A true feast.

item.name: Butter Naan
item.description: Soft leavened bread baked in a tandoor and finished with a generous brushing of melted butter. Perfectly fluffy.

item.name: Garlic Naan
item.description: Tandoor-baked bread topped with fresh garlic and coriander, brushed with butter. Fragrant and irresistible.

item.name: Laccha Paratha
item.description: Flaky, layered whole-wheat bread cooked on a tawa with ghee. Crispy on the outside, tender inside.

item.name: Gulab Jamun
item.description: Soft milk-solid dumplings soaked in cardamom-rose sugar syrup. Served warm. The ultimate Indian sweet indulgence.

item.name: Rasmalai
item.description: Delicate chenna discs soaked in chilled saffron-cardamom milk, garnished with pistachios. Light and heavenly.

item.name: Mango Kulfi
item.description: Traditional Indian ice cream made with condensed milk and Alphonso mangoes. Dense, rich, and refreshing.

item.name: Mango Lassi
item.description: Thick and creamy yogurt-based drink blended with fresh Alphonso mango pulp. Cooling and wonderfully sweet.

item.name: Masala Chai
item.description: Freshly brewed strong tea with ginger, cardamom, and spices, finished with whole milk. India's soul in a cup.

item.name: Fresh Lime Soda
item.description: Chilled soda with freshly squeezed lime juice, a pinch of black salt and cumin. Sweet or salted — you choose.
